city.name: Vienna
city.description: Set up your personal AI assistant in Vienna with OpenClaw. Perfect for Central European tech.
city.localFlavor: Vienna's tech scene values privacy and quality. OpenClaw is fully self-hosted - your data never leaves your servers. Perfect for the privacy-conscious European founder.
